title: Why AI Remembers and Forgets
summary: AI may recall your name from last month but forget what you said an hour ago. It is not random - different memory layers create different behavior, and once you see them the strange pattern makes more sense.

context.headline: Four layers of remembering
context.description: The model itself remembers nothing between requests. What feels like memory is built around it: the current context window, the chat history the app re-sends, saved facts the app stores, and documents fetched on demand. Each layer explains a different pattern in AI memory behavior.
context.when: Why your chatbot has such a strange memory
